Enumeration Case# MBUF_DONTWAIT

macOS 10.12+

```
MBUF_DONTWAIT = 1
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1644523-anonymous/mbuf_dontwait#discussion)

Don't allow the mbuf allocation call to block, if blocking is necessary fail and return immediately.
